title: Ray's Better Sugarcane
description: Ever wanted better, more natural looking Sugarcane, and don't have the time or energy to get create your own textures, well this is your solution
body:
# Better Sugar Cane — More natural, more immersive

Want sugar cane that blends naturally with its surroundings? **Better Sugar Cane** refreshes the vanilla sugar cane textures and adds a subtle 3D leaf model — all while keeping the vanilla aesthetic.  

### 🌱 Features
- Refined textures for a more organic look  
- 3D leaf geometry for extra depth  
- Lightweight and performance-friendly  
- Fully compatible with Minecraft **1.20.3 – 1.20.4**, **1.21.1 – 1.21.8**, and newer versions

![Before & After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/606cf553f6b02fdf987283e0111726e02912d489.png)  

### 🛠 Future ideas
<details>
<summary>Click to see what's coming</summary>

- Animated sugar cane variants
- Seasonal texture sets
- Additional subtle improvements based on community feedback

</details>

### 🔧 Changelog
<details>
<summary>v1.6.0 — 2025-10-03</summary>

- Updated pack metadata for compatibility with Minecraft 1.22+
- Refined sugar cane textures for a more natural look
- Added subtle 3D leaf model for extra depth
- Verified textures load correctly on all supported versions

</details>
